    create table assessment (
        attempt_limit integer,
        is_shuffle_option bit,

        description TEXT,
        title varchar(255) not null,
        grading_method enum ('AVERAGE','HIGHEST','LATEST'),
        status enum ('ACTIVE','DRAFT','INACTIVE'),
        primary key (id)
    ) engine=InnoDB

Hibernate: 
    create table assessment (
        attempt_limit integer,
        is_shuffle_option bit,
        is_shuffle_question bit,
        pass_score integer,
        time_limit_minutes integer,
        total_score integer,
        created_at datetime(6),
        id bigint not null auto_increment,
        programming_language_id bigint,
        updated_at datetime(6),
        code varchar(50) not null,
        assessment_type_id varchar(255) not null,
        description TEXT,
        title varchar(255) not null,
        grading_method enum ('AVERAGE','HIGHEST','LATEST'),
        status enum ('ACTIVE','DRAFT','INACTIVE'),
        primary key (id)
    ) engine=InnoDB
Hibernate: 
    create table assessment_questions (
        order_index integer,
        score float(53),
        assessment_id bigint not null,
        id binary(16) not null,
        question_id binary(16) not null,
        primary key (id)
    ) engine=InnoDB
Hibernate: 
    create table assessment_type (
        created_at date,
        updated_at date,
        description varchar(250),
        id varchar(255) not null,
        name varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    ) engine=InnoDB
Hibernate: 
    create table audit_logs (
        performed_at datetime(6),
        entity_id binary(16) not null,
        id binary(16) not null,
        performed_by binary(16) not null,
        action varchar(50) not null,
        entity_type varchar(50) not null,
        ip_address varchar(50),
        performed_by_email varchar(100),
        description varchar(500),
        new_value TEXT,
        old_value TEXT,
        primary key (id)
    ) engine=InnoDB
Hibernate: 
    create table classes (
        end_date date,
        is_active bit,
        start_date date,
        approver_id binary(16),
        class_id binary(16) not null,
        creator_id binary(16),
        semester_id binary(16) not null,
        enrollment_key varchar(500),
        class_code varchar(255),
        class_name varchar(255),
        review_reason varchar(255),
        class_status enum ('APPROVED','PENDING_APPROVAL','REJECTED'),
        primary key (class_id)
    ) engine=InnoDB
Hibernate: 
    create table communes (
        province_id varchar(2) not null,
        id varchar(5) not null,
        name varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    ) engine=InnoDB
Hibernate: 
    create table course_assessment_type_weights (
        weight float(53),
        course_id binary(16) not null,
        id binary(16) not null,
        assessment_type_id varchar(255) not null,
        grading_method enum ('AVERAGE','HIGHEST','LATEST'),
        primary key (id)
    ) engine=InnoDB
Hibernate: 
    create table course_classes (
        created_date datetime(6),
        updated_date datetime(6),
        class_id binary(16) not null,
        course_id binary(16) not null,
        id binary(16) not null,
        trainer_id binary(16),
        primary key (id)
    ) engine=InnoDB
Hibernate: 
    create table course_lessons (
        duration integer,
        sort_order integer,
        course_id binary(16) not null,
        id binary(16) not null,
        description TEXT,
        lesson_name varchar(255) not null,
        primary key (id)
    ) engine=InnoDB
Hibernate: 
    create table course_objectives (
        created_date datetime(6),
        course_id binary(16) not null,
        id binary(16) not null,
        description TEXT,
